sentence_text: The appeal held up the construction blueprint.
pair_rationale: Both objects are construction-administration nouns; a permit process can be delayed by an appeal, whereas a blueprint is a document, not the progress point being held up.
notes: multi-agent synthesis v1; replaces payment/receipt pair because receipt can also be delayed; appeal subject suppresses literal holding-up readings.

sentence_text: The witness turned up at court.
pair_rationale: Both complements are legal-domain nouns; court is a location/event site, whereas testimony is not a place where someone turns up.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Arrival sense can work, but turn up also means increase volume and be found.

sentence_text: The coach turned around the season.
pair_rationale: Both objects are sports-outcome nouns; a season can be transformed, whereas a defeat itself is not normally turned around after the fact.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Improvement-after-problems sense can work with teams/companies if outcome words are controlled.

sentence_text: The agency set up a review process.
pair_rationale: Process and finding are review-domain nouns; only the process can naturally be established or arranged.
notes: replaces pv_003 give out; candidate_id=rep_018; original_v6_action=replace_or_rewrite; Check whether set up a finding is impossible for all native reviewers.

sentence_text: The bidder put up the required estimate.
intended_sense: provide money or security for a purpose
pair_rationale: Both objects are procurement-domain requirements; a deposit can be put up as security, whereas an estimate is submitted or provided rather than put up in this sense.
notes: multi-agent synthesis v1; replaces banner/brochure display pair because put up a brochure is plausibly acceptable; security-money sense improves C1 construct fit.

sentence_text: The committee threw out the weak agenda.
pair_rationale: Proposal and agenda are meeting-domain objects; proposal is rejectable, agenda is normally revised or changed.
notes: replaces pv_025 clean up; candidate_id=rep_010; original_v6_action=replace_or_rewrite; Check whether throw out the agenda can mean discard/cancel agenda.

sentence_text: The firm brought in a consultant.
intended_sense: ask someone to do a job or task
pair_rationale: Both objects are professional-service nouns; the target sense requires a person or role, not the service event itself.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Recruit/ask-someone sense requires human role contexts; many abstractions can be brought in.

sentence_text: The publisher brought out a revised edition.
pair_rationale: Edition and appointment are publishing/professional-domain nouns; appointment is not released as a publication.
notes: replaces pv_024 put out; candidate_id=rep_009; original_v6_action=replace_or_rewrite; Select release sense only; avoid make-quality-noticeable sense.

sentence_text: The researchers carried out the hypothesis.
pair_rationale: Both objects are research-domain nouns; analysis is a task that can be carried out, whereas hypothesis is a proposition to test.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Conduct/perform task sense is strong for academic LJT; use plausible wrong task objects.

sentence_text: The union broke off the talks.
pair_rationale: Both objects belong to negotiation contexts; the unacceptable item targets the fact that break off selects talks or relations, not a proposal itself.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Use negotiation/relationship contexts; avoid object-category anomalies such as agenda.

sentence_text: The doctor followed up after the thermometer.
pair_rationale: Both complements are medical-domain nouns; the follow-up frame requires an event or case, not an instrument.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Further-action sense can work with medical/research follow-up contexts.

sentence_text: The clerk turned over the permission to police.
intended_sense: give control or possession to an authority
pair_rationale: Both objects are administrative/legal nouns; records can be surrendered to authorities, but permission is not an object surrendered in this frame.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Authority-transfer sense can work, but literal turning-over sense must be suppressed.

sentence_text: The doctor ruled out infection.
pair_rationale: Both objects are medical-domain nouns; infection can be excluded as a possibility, whereas symptoms are observed signs, not the ruled-out condition.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Exclude-possibility sense is a strong academic candidate with manageable near-misses.

sentence_text: The lab ran out of samples.
pair_rationale: Both objects are research-domain nouns; samples can be depleted as supplies, whereas findings are not normally used up as a stock.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Depletion can be tested with countable resources; avoid impossible object categories.

sentence_text: The theater put on a musical.
pair_rationale: Both objects belong to theater contexts; the unacceptable item uses a theater-related artifact rather than an event or performance.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Event-staging sense can work, but clothing/application senses are strong competitors.

sentence_text: The data backed up the confusion.
pair_rationale: Both nouns are research-discourse nouns; data can support a conclusion, but not confusion as a claim.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Evidence-support sense can work; computer copy/reverse senses must be suppressed.

sentence_text: The ruling opened up new appeal deadlines.
pair_rationale: Both objects are appeal-domain outcomes; options can become available, whereas deadlines are set, extended, or missed rather than opened up.
notes: multi-agent synthesis v1; revises opportunities/objections pair because objections could be caused or invited by a policy; legal appeal frame blocks disclosure/speaking readings.

sentence_text: The lawyer took on the difficult case.
pair_rationale: Case and verdict are legal-domain nouns; only the case is a responsibility one can undertake.
notes: replaces pv_006 sit back; candidate_id=rep_019; original_v6_action=replace_or_rewrite; Strong candidate, but verify that verdict is not interpretable as a challenge.

sentence_text: The students worked out the pencil.
pair_rationale: Both objects are classroom-domain nouns; equation is a problem that can be solved, whereas pencil is not.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Solution/calculation sense is strong if both conditions involve problems or quantities.

sentence_text: The abstract summed up the study.
pair_rationale: Both nouns are academic-document nouns; an abstract summarizes a study, not a heading.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Summarize-content sense is strong if both conditions use text/content objects.

sentence_text: One essay stood out among submissions.
pair_rationale: Both nouns are writing-domain nouns; the unacceptable item changes the comparison set from same-class submissions to document parts.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Use comparison among same-class candidates; avoid odd comparison sets.

sentence_text: The passengers got on the station.
pair_rationale: Both nouns are transport-domain nouns; only a vehicle-like noun is compatible with the boarding sense.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Transport sense is clear, but unacceptable item must remain in transport context rather than object category.

sentence_text: The investors pulled back from the approval.
pair_rationale: Both complements are decision-domain nouns; the unacceptable item uses a state/result where an activity or commitment is expected.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Withdrawal sense can work if both conditions describe activities or commitments.

sentence_text: The lender cut off the credit rating.
intended_sense: stop providing a supply, service, or access
pair_rationale: Both objects are finance-domain credit nouns; a credit line is an access/resource that can be stopped, whereas a credit rating is an evaluation rather than a supply.
notes: multi-agent synthesis v1; replaces host/caller/topic pair because cut off the topic can mean stop discussing it; finance frame blocks physical cutting and speech interruption readings.

sentence_text: The diagram laid out the process.
pair_rationale: Both objects are document/information nouns; diagram can present a process clearly, not normally a footnote.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Present/organize-information sense is strong, but literal arrangement sense must be avoided.

sentence_text: The review pointed out the appendix.
pair_rationale: Both objects are academic-document nouns; the review can identify a limitation, whereas appendix is a document part and creates weaker target fit.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Draw-attention sense is strong if both sentences keep human/author subjects.

sentence_text: The committee took up the funding issue.
pair_rationale: Issue and outcome are same institutional domain; outcome is less naturally taken up as an agenda item.
notes: replaces pv_004 put in; candidate_id=rep_002; original_v6_action=replace_or_rewrite; Check whether take up the outcome is acceptable as discuss outcome.

sentence_text: The senator came out against the evidence.
pair_rationale: Both objects belong to public-hearing or policy discourse; a proposal is a stance target one can come out against, whereas evidence is normally challenged or disputed, not opposed through this come-out-against frame.
notes: multi-agent synthesis v1; replaces reveal-sense secret/witness pair because person subjects invite literal/social readings; stance frame makes the target sense clearer.

sentence_text: The board turned down the evidence.
pair_rationale: Proposal and evidence are decision-domain objects; evidence is normally excluded or dismissed, not turned down.
notes: replaces pv_038 come on; candidate_id=rep_016; original_v6_action=drop; Check legal/register acceptability of turn down evidence.

sentence_text: The nurse reached out to symptoms.
pair_rationale: Both complements are health-domain nouns; the target sense requires a person or group that can be contacted.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Communication/help sense can work with human/institutional recipients.

sentence_text: The client took out a mortgage.
intended_sense: obtain an official service or document
pair_rationale: Both objects are finance/document nouns; mortgage fits the obtain-an-official-service sense, while receipt does not.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Official-service sense can work with loans/policies; remove-from-container and social-date senses compete.

sentence_text: The reforms brought about change.
pair_rationale: Both objects are policy/research nouns; reforms can cause change, whereas evidence is normally produced or found rather than brought about by reforms.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Causation sense can work in academic contexts if result nouns are controlled.

sentence_text: The board put off the final vote.
pair_rationale: Vote and evidence are decision-domain objects; only the vote is naturally schedulable for delay.
notes: replaces pv_005 take in; candidate_id=rep_030; original_v6_action=replace_or_rewrite; Evidence can be excluded or withheld, but not normally put off.

sentence_text: The passengers got off the terminal.
pair_rationale: Both nouns are transport-domain nouns; only the vehicle-like noun supports the leave-a-vehicle sense.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Vehicle-leaving sense can work in travel contexts; avoid broad non-vehicle objects.

sentence_text: The agency shut down the reason.
pair_rationale: Program and reason are institutional-domain nouns; only the program is an operation that can be shut down.
notes: replaces pv_037 go down; candidate_id=rep_015; original_v6_action=replace_or_rewrite; Strong candidate; check whether reason is too obviously wrong.

sentence_text: The investment paid off quickly.
pair_rationale: Both subjects are finance-domain nouns; investment can yield a benefit, while invoice is not normally an intransitive source of payoff.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Outcome-benefit sense can work if effort/investment and result are controlled.

sentence_text: The guard handed over the arrest.
intended_sense: give control or possession to someone
pair_rationale: Both objects are legal-domain nouns; the unacceptable item keeps the domain but uses an event noun that cannot be handed over as custody or control.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Use possession/control-transfer contexts with plausible entities; avoid non-transferable abstractions.

sentence_text: The mediator sorted out the scheduling conflict.
pair_rationale: Conflict and forecast are scheduling-domain nouns; conflict can be resolved, forecast cannot.
notes: replaces pv_017 make out; candidate_id=rep_007; original_v6_action=drop; Keep target sense as resolve_problem, not understand_cause.

sentence_text: The company gave in to public pressure.
pair_rationale: Pressure and policy are public-domain nouns; pressure can force yielding, policy normally cannot.
notes: replaces pv_007 hold back; candidate_id=rep_005; original_v6_action=replace_or_rewrite; May be a comparatively easy anchor item for C1.

sentence_text: The team moved up to first place.
pair_rationale: Both outcomes are ranking positions; rejection depends on knowing that move up denotes upward rank movement.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Hierarchy/status contrast is locally tied to the PV and comparatively robust.

sentence_text: The consultant filled in for the project meeting.
intended_sense: act as a temporary substitute for someone
pair_rationale: Both complements are project-governance nouns; a chair is a role/person one can temporarily replace, whereas a meeting is an event rather than the person or role substituted for.
notes: multi-agent synthesis v1; replaces fill someone in on X frame because almost any topic can fit that frame; substitute-for sense gives cleaner acceptability contrast.

sentence_text: The report set out the appendix.
pair_rationale: Both nouns are document-domain nouns; the target sense selects an explanation or rules, not a document section as such.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Explain/present-clearly sense can work in report/policy contexts; literal laying-out/travel senses compete.

sentence_text: The comment set off a heated summary.
pair_rationale: Debate and summary are discourse-domain products; only debate is an event/reaction that can be triggered.
notes: replaces pv_029 keep up; candidate_id=rep_028; original_v6_action=replace_or_rewrite; Summary is a document/product cue; consider replacing with dispute in review.

sentence_text: The coach broke down the play.
pair_rationale: Both nouns are sports-domain nouns; a play can be analyzed into parts, whereas a whistle is not an analytical problem in this frame.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Analysis/decomposition sense can work with problem/task contexts; avoid physical failure sense.

sentence_text: The director passed on the client's message.
pair_rationale: Message and silence are communication-domain nouns; only a message can normally be passed on.
notes: replaces pv_021 get down; candidate_id=rep_027; original_v6_action=replace_or_rewrite; Silence may be too easy as a non-transferable object; native review needed.

sentence_text: The team took back the loss.
pair_rationale: Both nouns are sports-outcome nouns; lead can be regained, whereas loss is not normally regained by taking it back.
notes: v6 candidate: pre-audio expert review required; do not record yet; Use regain-control contexts; current acceptable sentence also needs rewriting.

sentence_text: The deputy took over the advice.
pair_rationale: Project and advice are workplace-domain objects; advice cannot normally be taken over as responsibility.
notes: replaces pv_039 come in; candidate_id=rep_017; original_v6_action=replace_or_rewrite; Best current draft among replacements.

sentence_text: The trial played out over two weeks.
pair_rationale: Both nouns are legal-domain items; a trial unfolds over time, whereas a verdict is an outcome rather than the unfolding event.
notes: multi-agent synthesis v1; revises earlier negotiations/agreement pair because agreement could plausibly play out in public; legal time-frame suppresses exhausted/literal readings.
